original_image_tags: A table from a document, typewritten. The columns are LAUNCH SEQ, DATE, NICKNAME, OP #, FACILITY, VEHICLE TYPE, PROGRAM, CUM BY BOOSTER, COMMAND, and CUM BY COMMAND. The table lists 20 entries from August 14, 1974 to January 9, 1975. At the bottom are two dark circular punch-holes. The page number "PAGE 64" is at the bottom right.

elements.description: The page contains a typed table with columns including LAUNCH SEQ, DATE, NICKNAME, OP #, FACILITY, VEHICLE TYPE, PROGRAM, CUM BY BOOSTER, COMMAND, and CUM BY COMMAND, listing launch data from 1248 (14 Aug 74) to 1267 (9 Jan 75). There are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts embedded in the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains only a typed table with identical column headers and date ranges, and both explicitly state there are no embedded photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts.
